scenarios.description: parse("01.2.3") returns null when numeric identifier has leading zero
scenarios.expectedResult: null is returned due to parser rejecting leading zeros
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parse leading-zero in major
String version = "01.2.3";  // invalid: leading zero in major
assert result == null;  // parse() catches exception and returns null

scenarios.description: parse("1.2.3+build.1.2") returns Semver with build metadata only
pseudocode: TEST TC08 parse valid semver with build only
String version = "1.2.3+build.1.2";  // valid semver with only build metadata
